name: solution-manager
description: Rider-style Solution view for .sln and .slnx files, projects, folders, and files.

solutionManager.nuget.skipRestore.description: Skip package restore when installing or updating NuGet packages from Solution Manager.

solutionManager.nuget.sources.description: Editable NuGet package sources used by Solution Manager. Each item is a JSON object with name and url.

view/item/context.when: view == solutionManager.solutionView && (viewItem == projectLoaded || viewItem == projectTestLoaded || viewItem == projectUnloaded)

solutionManager.dependency.referenceCopy.when: view == solutionManager.solutionView && (viewItem == dependencyItem.import || viewItem == dependencyItem.assemblies || viewItem == dependencyItem.projects || viewItem == dependencyItem.analyzers || viewItem == dependencyItem.sourceGenerators || viewItem == dependencyItem.compileAssets || viewItem == dependencyItem.runtimeAssets)

scripts.compile: npm run compile:ts && npm run compile:protocol-host
